subcodes.first_line: We have found in thy words the sweet fragrances of thy love for thy Lord, the All-Merciful. Blessed art thou for having turned unto the Qiblih of the worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد وجدنا من کلماتک روایح حبک ربک الرحمن طوبی لک بما اقبلت قبله العالمین و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for teaching, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
